---
title: BoundsCache
description: Spatial bounds cache for span collision detection and culling
---

## Overview

The `BoundsCache` stores axis-aligned bounding boxes (AABBs) for each span, computed from curve geometry. Enables fast spatial queries, frustum culling, and raycast early-outs without iterating over curve points.

## BoundsCacheEntry

Represents cached spatial bounds for a single span.

### Fields

<ResponseField name="whole" type="AABBd" required>
  Axis-aligned bounding box enclosing the entire span curve. Computed by taking the min/max of all points in the corresponding `CurveCacheEntry`.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="segments" type="std::vector<AABBd>" required>
  Per-segment bounding boxes for finer spatial queries. Each entry corresponds to a segment between consecutive curve points, enabling hierarchical culling.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="source_version" type="std::uint64_t" default="0">
  Version number from `SpanRuntimeState::bounds_version` when this entry was last rebuilt. Used to detect stale cache entries.
</ResponseField>

## BoundsCache

Container mapping span IDs to their bounds cache entries.

### Fields

<ResponseField name="by_span" type="std::unordered_map<ObjectId, BoundsCacheEntry>" required>
  Map from span `ObjectId` to its cached bounds data. Only contains entries for spans that have been processed by the bounds recalc pipeline.
</ResponseField>

## Version-Based Invalidation

Bounds cache entries are invalidated when:
- Curve cache is invalidated (depends on geometry)
- Direct geometry changes (endpoints move, settings change)

The system compares `BoundsCacheEntry::source_version` against `SpanRuntimeState::bounds_version`. Bounds are always recomputed after curve geometry updates, ensuring consistency.

## Querying the Cache

Use `CoreState::find_bounds_cache()` to safely query entries:

```cpp
const BoundsCacheEntry* entry = core_state.find_bounds_cache(span_id);
if (entry) {
  // Fast frustum culling
  if (frustum.intersects(entry->whole)) {
    // Span is visible, proceed with rendering
  }
  
  // Fine-grained raycast
  for (const AABBd& segment_aabb : entry->segments) {
    if (ray.intersects(segment_aabb)) {
      // Perform detailed intersection test on this segment
    }
  }
}
```

Returns `nullptr` if:
- Span doesn't exist
- Bounds haven't been computed yet
- Cache was invalidated but not yet rebuilt

## Use Cases

### Frustum Culling
```cpp
for (const auto& [span_id, span] : spans) {
  const BoundsCacheEntry* bounds = core_state.find_bounds_cache(span_id);
  if (bounds && !camera_frustum.intersects(bounds->whole)) {
    continue; // Skip invisible span
  }
  render_span(span);
}
```

### Spatial Queries
```cpp
std::vector<ObjectId> find_spans_in_region(const AABBd& query_box) {
  std::vector<ObjectId> results;
  for (const auto& [span_id, bounds_entry] : bounds_cache.by_span) {
    if (query_box.intersects(bounds_entry.whole)) {
      results.push_back(span_id);
    }
  }
  return results;
}
```
